## SDK Generation Triggered 🚀

Monitoring pipeline status and will update this issue with SDK pull request links once generation is complete.

## SDK Generation Complete ✅

SDK generation has completed for **Azure NetApp Files** (API version `2026-01-01`).

sdk pr for Python: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-python/pull/46408
sdk pr for JavaScript: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/pull/38216
